spec.name: Main Street
spec.description: This was once a magnificent street, but now is in total ruin. The streets are barren and windswept and the silence is unending. To the south you see a ruined cottage while north leads into a dark back alley. Howls and screams echo through the deserted city.

north.description: It seems to be a dark alley.

east.description: The entrance to the city lies this way.

south.description: A ruined shack lies to the south.
